samples.xml_description: Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. Clock input Active low reset signal Enable signal for addition operation 64-bit input operand A 64-bit input operand B 65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb. Output enable signal. Number of pipeline stages in the adder. if (!rst_n) begin i_en_reg = 0; end else begin i_en_reg = i_en; end if (!rst_n) begin adda_reg = 0; end else begin adda_reg = adda; end if (!rst_n) begin addb_reg = 0; end else begin addb_reg = addb; end if (!rst_n) begin sum_reg = 0; end else if (i_en_reg) begin sum_reg = adda_reg + addb_reg; end if (!rst_n) begin o_en_reg = 0; end else if (i_en_reg) begin o_en_reg = 1; end else begin o_en_reg = 0; end {sum_reg[63], sum_reg}; o_en_reg;
